Comment: The class wasn't bad, but there was no server set up, so we couldn't do anything hands-on, and it was just conceptual, so all he would do was lecture and read off the slides. I feel like I wasted my tuition money taking this course because I didn't really get anything out of it. There were 5 quizzes, one midterm, and a final.
Tags: Lots of homework, Caring, Lecture heavy

Comment: The class wasn't so hard, but sometimes I wish that his lectures were more interactive because it's easy to lose focus in his lectures since all he does is read off the slides. His quizzes aren't bad, and the exams are half written and half coding.

I don't think he's a good instructor. The exam is challenging, and I've had to put a lot of time into this course, but it's still hard to get an A. During my internship, I also realized that the material we covered was pretty OUTDATED!

These reviews make me so sad! He is a great professor, and you will do well if you go to lecture and ask questions. Not sure how he is with larger classes (we only had 6 students in ours) but he would encourage us to ask questions and participate. I would say the content is a bit challenging, especially with the later units, but just pay attention.

I have emailed him with questions and followed up, but he has never responded. The only opportunity to ask him is during class breaks, but he seems indifferent and dismissive toward students. He doesn't appear to enjoy teaching, nor does he seem to have a strong research record. It feels like he is just going through the motions. Bad experience

He is mean and impatient toward students who do not follow his instructions. He does not grade assignments seriously and often ignores emails. He seems disinterested in teaching and appears to focus on publishing low-quality papers. Although I got an A, I will never take his class again. It required a lot of time studying on my own.
Tags: Lots of homework, Lecture heavy, Test heavy

Comment: Somewhat hard to understand, very theoretical lectures. Testing and quizzes are very easy if you know the basic formulas for the course. Allows one page equations sheet for tests.
